summary: A small rectangular memorial or decorative structure with a raised foundation platform. The building features a brick wall base with decorative gold/yellow accents, topped by a dark wood or dark block roof with a gable profile. It sits on a white concrete foundation platform surrounded by dirt and grass.
rebuild_hints: Create a rectangular foundation platform using white concrete blocks approximately 8×6 blocks
Build brick wall on top of foundation, approximately 3 blocks high
Add a horizontal stripe of gold/yellow decorative blocks across the middle of the brick wall
Frame the brick section with stone brick trim on sides and top
Construct a gable roof using dark wood or dark blocks, peaked at center
Ensure bilateral symmetry along the length axis
The roof appears to have stepped/layered construction creating the gable profile
Top view shows a rectangular footprint with centered dark roof structure
uncertainties: Exact roof material (dark oak wood, dark spruce, or dark blocks) cannot be definitively determined
Precise height of brick wall section uncertain from angles shown
Interior structure or hollow nature of building not visible
Exact block count for foundation platform estimated from visual proportions
Gold accent material could be gold blocks or gold ore blocks
